title: Windows Access Token Manipulation
description: Detects access token manipulation techniques used for privilege escalation. Attackers steal or forge tokens to impersonate other users, especially SYSTEM or domain admin, without needing their credentials.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*Invoke-TokenManipulation*' or 'Command Line' like '*token::elevate*' or 'Command Line' like '*token::revert*' or 'Command Line' like '*incognito.exe*')) or (('Command Line' like '*ImpersonateLoggedOnUser*' or 'Command Line' like '*DuplicateTokenEx*' or 'Command Line' like '*CreateProcessWithToken*' or 'Command Line' like '*SetThreadToken*' or 'Command Line' like '*AdjustTokenPrivileges*')) or (('Command Line' like '*JuicyPotato*' or 'Command Line' like '*SweetPotato*' or 'Command Line' like '*PrintSpoofer*' or 'Command Line' like '*GodPotato*' or 'Command Line' like '*RottenPotato*')))
